name: forge
description: Forge — Forge stronger AI agents. Behavioral constraints, autonomous loops, skill validation, and quick news for your coding rhythm. Zero dependencies.

plugins.name: block-break
plugins.description: Block Break — Behavioral constraint engine. Forces Claude to exhaust all approaches before giving up. L0-L4 pressure escalation. Zero-dep.

plugins.name: ralph-boost
plugins.description: Ralph Boost — Autonomous dev loop engine with built-in convergence guarantee. Prevents infinite spinning. Zero-dep.

plugins.name: skill-lint
plugins.description: Skill Lint — Validate Claude Code skill plugins. Structural (bash) + semantic (AI) checks. Works on any plugin project. Zero-dep.

plugins.name: council-fuse
plugins.description: Council Fuse — Multi-perspective deliberation engine. 3 agents debate independently, Chairman synthesizes the best answer. Zero-dep.

plugins.name: news-fetch
plugins.description: News Fetch — Quick news at your fingertips. Take a mental break between coding sessions. 3-tier network fallback, Markdown output. Zero-dep.
